reviewer.evidencePolicy: Mark runner readiness and verification claims satisfied only where checked-in runtime, CLI, schema, and skill-disclosure tests exercise the generic packet contract.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim names the first read-only doctor/status and schema slice for runner readiness, covered by runtime, CLI, and schema tests.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Doctor, doctor status, runner readiness, and schema tests verify read-only readiness visibility plus a minimal cautilus.runner_assessment.v1 schema and example.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep doctor and doctor status read-only when extending runner readiness setup branches.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim is a deterministic runner assessment freshness rule.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: TestRunnerReadinessReportsAssessedSmokeOnlyAndStaleStates verifies repoCommit drift is reported as fresh-with-head-drift provenance while matching adapter and runner file hashes avoid stale state.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep repoCommit as provenance and adapter/runner hashes as freshness keys when modifying assessment stale logic.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim names the operator scaffold boundary for runner assessments, covered by doctor next branches and checked-in assessment fixtures.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Runner readiness branches expose required assessment artifacts and scaffoldSource=fixtures/runner-readiness/example-assessment.json, while schema tests validate the assessment packet shape.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep one concrete assessment scaffold source in runner readiness branches when changing doctor next-action output.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim names the Cautilus Agent product surface, protected by the skill disclosure scanner and doctor status orientation tests.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: The skill disclosure scanner verifies source and packaged Cautilus Agent copies keep one progressive surface, required command-discovery fragments, and no split discover/eval/improve/runner framing.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Run the skill disclosure scanner when changing Cautilus Agent routing, command discovery, or runner readiness guidance.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim names the durable runner assessment packet boundary, covered by runner verification and evaluation proof tests.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Runner verification tests require product-proof capability evidence in cautilus.runner_assessment.v1 before readiness is presented as clean, and evaluation/improve proof tests consume assessment-backed truth rather than agent prose.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep runner verification truth packet-shaped in cautilus.runner_assessment.v1 when adding Cautilus Agent assessment authoring help.
